src/main/java/com/groupten/bmsproject/Bm.general_idea: Added explicit @ComponentScan annotation to ensure Spring component scanning is configured.
Added a static field to store the primary JavaFX Stage for global access.
Changed the initial FXML file loaded from Login.fxml to Dashboard.fxml.
Assigned the passed Stage instance to the static primaryStage field in the start method.
Added a public static getter method to access the Spring application context.
src/main/java/com/groupten/bmsproject/Bm.human_impl: public static ConfigurableApplicationContext getApplicationContext() { return applicationContext; }

src/main/java/com/groupten/bmsproject/Bm.general_idea: Added a public static getter method to access the primary JavaFX Stage.
src/main/java/com/groupten/bmsproject/Bm.human_impl: public static Stage getPrimaryStage() { return primaryStage; }

pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK environment.
Include the Spring Boot JDBC starter to enable database connectivity features required by the application logic.

src/main/resources/Login.fxml.general_idea: Updated the FXML controller reference to reflect the new package structure for controllers.
Replaced the basic Label component with a styled Text component for the login header.
Replaced the generic TextField for password with a secure PasswordField.
Updated the email field prompt text to allow username or email.
Added a new button to handle the forgot password functionality.
Renamed the submit button to login button and updated its action handler.
Added a new button to navigate to the registration page.
Added text prompting users to register if they don't have an account.
Added an ImageView for a security-themed banner image.
Added an ImageView for the application logo.
Applied consistent CSS styling and font settings to all new buttons.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Added Spring Mail properties to configure SMTP connection for email functionality.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.human_impl: Added spring.mail.host, port, username, password, and SMTP auth/TLS properties.
